title: ozoroa rangeana
intro: Ozoroa rangeana is a type of plant that belongs to the Anacardiaceae family, commonly known as the cashew family, and is native to southern Africa. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ozoroa rangeana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate arthritis symptoms, and improve digestion. In traditional medicine, Ozoroa rangeana is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various ailments, and its bark and roots are also used in traditional herbal preparations.
